ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on investment for the stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock's price */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for the stock */,
  "min_corr_stock" TEXT /* Stock with the minimum correlation to the current stock */,
  "corr_value" REAL /* Correlation value between the current stock and the minimum correlation stock */,
  "daily_return" REAL /* Daily return of the stock */,
  "weekly_return" REAL /* Weekly return of the stock */,
  "monthly_return" REAL /* Monthly return of the stock */,
  "quarterly_return" REAL /* Quarterly return of the stock */,
  "semi_annual_return" REAL /* Semi-annual return of the stock */,
  "annual_return" REAL /* Annual return of the stock */,
  "ytd_return" REAL /* Year-to-date return of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividends (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last performance update */,
  "total_return_1_year" REAL /* Total return over the past year */,
  "total_return_5_years" REAL /* Total return over the past five years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio stock entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of market event (e.g., price movement, earnings report) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, earnings report, news) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
